title: Concatenating Two Linked Lists
description: A visual representation of the process to join two separate linked lists into a single, combined list by connecting the 'next' pointer of the last node in the first list to the first node of the second list.
elements: List A: Head Node A -> Node B -> Tail Node C
List B: Head Node D -> Node E -> Tail Node F
Final Combined List: Head Node A -> Node B -> Node C -> Head Node D -> Node E -> Tail Node F
relationships: The 'next' pointer of Tail Node C (from List A) is updated to point to Head Node D (from List B), linking the two lists sequentially.
